title: BSD Rank 2 Plus Regulator and Leading Coefficient Deep Dive

analysis.object: T447: BSD Rank 2 Plus Regulator and Leading Coefficient Deep Dive depth analysis

regulator_def.description: Reg(E) = det of height pairing matrix: EML-2

leading_coeff.description: L*(E,1) = leading coefficient of L at s=1: EML-2

delta_d_measure.description: Regulator is Deltad=+2 from rank (count) to volume

tropical_regulator.description: Tropical regulator = MAX-PLUS volume of tropical lattice

regulator_law.description: T447: regulator is EML-2 shadow of Mordell-Weil EML-3 structure; Deltad=+2 from count to measure

analysis.theorem: T447: BSD Rank 2 Plus Regulator and Leading Coefficient Deep Dive (S726).
